title: Publish open eligibility-structuring benchmark from the gold standard
context: Backlog/future (unscheduled). The double-reviewed gold standard can seed an open eligibility-structuring benchmark for this rare disease, with methodology aligned to the Chia corpus (methods reused only, not Chia's data). The benchmark is a research good with 100% provenance and the not-advice disclaimer; it never functions as an eligibility determination.
objective: Publish an open eligibility-structuring benchmark derived from the gold standard, with methodology aligned to the Chia corpus.
acceptanceCriteria: Benchmark is released (CC-BY-4.0) derived from the double-reviewed gold standard.
Methodology is aligned with and cites the Chia corpus; only methods are reused, not Chia's Ewing data.
100% provenance on every assertion; not-advice + not-eligibility-determination disclaimer present.
No investigator/contact PII; ambiguous criteria withheld.
resources: Kury et al., Chia corpus (Scientific Data, 2020, CC-BY-4.0)
